inputs.label: Minimum Value
inputs.businessContext: The lower bound of the measured data set.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lower bound of the measured data set.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die untere Grenze des gemessenen Datensatzes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La limite inférieure de l'ensemble de données mesurées.
businessContext_i18n.es: El límite inferior del conjunto de datos medidos.

inputs.label: Maximum Value
inputs.businessContext: The upper bound of the measured data set.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upper bound of the measured data set.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die obere Grenze des gemessenen Datensatzes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La limite supérieure de l'ensemble de données mesurées.
businessContext_i18n.es: El límite superior del conjunto de datos medidos.

inputs.label: Nominal Value
inputs.businessContext: The target or expected value for the measurement.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target or expected value for the measurement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm için hedef veya beklenen değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Ziel- oder Erwartungswert für die Messung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur cible ou attendue pour la mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor objetivo o esperado para la medición.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: The permissible deviation from nominal; used to compute out-of-tolerance margins.

businessContext_i18n.en: The permissible deviation from nominal; used to compute out-of-tolerance margins.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominalden izin verilen sapma; tolerans dışı marjları hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die zulässige Abweichung vom Nennwert; zur Berechnung der Toleranzüberschreitungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'écart admissible par rapport à la valeur nominale ; utilisé pour calculer les marges de hors tolérance.
businessContext_i18n.es: La desviación permitida del valor nominal; se utiliza para calcular los márgenes fuera de tolerancia.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
